moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Mostly just used for the LP > LP target combo | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Great combo tool with the MP > MP target combo | +2F extra recovery frames (17F) on whiff

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Can be held | Great range and whiff punishing tool

moves.name: Stand HP (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 5 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 7-17 | Great range and frame advantage on hit and block makes this a great combo / pressure / bully tool

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Does not combo into anything at farther ranges except Super Art 2 | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Strong poke and drive rush tool (but a bit slow start-up)

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Can be held | Solid poke tool with good hitbox priority that launches opponent into a free juggle state on Punish Counter

moves.name: Stand HK (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 10 frames if HK is released between start-up frames 5-13 | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Marisa's only 4F normal | Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Further range than most crouch MP (but slower start-up) | Topmost hurtboxes on frames 8-15 are projectile invincible (avoids Sagat's MP/HP Tiger Shot)

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Can be held | Head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 10-13

moves.name: Crouch HP (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 4 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 5-16 | Head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 20-31

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Solid low poke with good range and great hitbox priority | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Can be held for a higher damage and juggle potential | Topmost hurtboxes on frames 1-7 are projectile invincible (avoids Sagat's MP/HP Tiger Shot)

moves.name: Crouch HK (hold)
moves.notes: Marisa lifts up her front leg hurtbox on frames 8-22 which can avoid some low attacks during this window (this property is lost immediately if the HK button is released early during start-up) | Uncharged version comes out in only 4 frames if HK is released between start-up frames 7-15

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Can be held

moves.name: Jump HP (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 5 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 5-19 | Spikes down airborne opponents on hit

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Cross-up | Good tool for safe jump oki

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Marisa's furthest reaching horizontal jump-in | Pretty good horizontal hitbox priority

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Can be held

moves.name: Jump HK (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 3 frames if HK is released between start-up frames 7-19 | Spikes down opponents on hit into a Hard Knockdown

moves.name: Volare Combo
moves.notes: Spikes down airborne opponents on hit

moves.name: Caelum Arc
moves.notes: Can only be performed from a neutral jump | Can be held

moves.name: Caelum Arc (hold)
moves.notes: Can only be performed from a neutral jump | Uncharged version comes out in only 4 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 5-19

moves.name: Novacula
moves.notes: Forward moving attack with high/low follow-up options | Great range for a 10F move makes this a great punish tool in some matchups

moves.name: Novacula Swipe
moves.notes: Low follow-up

moves.name: Novacula Thrust
moves.notes: High hitting (not an Overhead) follow-up that cannot hit crouching (-21 oH | -26 oB vs Crouch) | Cancelable into all Supers

moves.name: Malleus
moves.notes: Overhead | Can be held

moves.name: Malleus (hold)
moves.notes: Overhead | Uncharged version comes out in only 14 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 7-13

moves.name: Malleus Breaker
moves.notes: 2-hit Overhead | Deals 100 extra damage (1900 overall) if performed from a held df+HP

moves.name: Magna Bunker
moves.notes: Can be held | Short range but a fantastic combo / pressure / bully tool

moves.name: Magna Bunker (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 3 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 5-16 | Short range but a fantastic combo / pressure / bully tool

moves.name: Knee
moves.notes: Can be held | Good range and fully cancelable with great frame advantage when held makes this a fantastic combo / pressure / bully tool

moves.name: Knee (hold)
moves.notes: Uncharged version comes out in only 7 frames if HK is released between start-up frames 7-14 | Uncharged version comes out in only 4 frames if HK is released between start-up frames 15-20

moves.name: Falx Crusher
moves.notes: Combo / Juggle tool mostly | Deals 100 extra damage (2000 overall) if performed from a held f+HK

moves.name: Light Two Hitter
moves.notes: Only combos on Counter-Hit or Punish Counter | The second hit applies a 5% damage scaling penalty when combo'd into

moves.name: Medium Two Hitter
moves.notes: One of Marisa's main combo / pressure / bully tools up close | True blockstring

moves.name: Heavy Two Hitter
moves.notes: 5F frametrap between hits on block (trades with 6F) - but only 1F frametrap between hits if performed from a held HP | Deals 200 extra damage (2100 overall) if performed from a held HP

moves.name: Mounted Grace
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Can Drive Rush into a meaty throw in corner only | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Ponte Milvio
moves.notes: Throw Loop when used while cornered: Dash forward for a meaty strike or Drive Rush for a meaty strike/throw mix | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Drive Impact: Secutor
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Love Tap
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: Taunt
moves.notes: Forward taunt has 1 hit of armor on frames 85-139

moves.name: LP Gladius
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 5-10 | BUG: Can hold the LP button for 11-12 frames to extend the armor window by 1-2 frames without sacrificing any start-up

moves.name: LP Gladius (hold)
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 5-26 | Uncharged version comes out in only 5 frames if LP is released between start-up frames 12-19

moves.name: MP Gladius
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 5-12 | Can be held

moves.name: MP Gladius (hold)
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 5-29 | Uncharged version comes out in only 7 frames if MP is released between start-up frames 12-19

moves.name: HP Gladius
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 5-15 | Can be held

moves.name: HP Gladius (hold)
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 5-35 | Uncharged version comes out in only 10 frames if HP is released between start-up frames 12-19

moves.name: OD Gladius
moves.notes: Armor Break | 2 hits of armor on upper body while holding the punch buttons

moves.name: OD Gladius (hold)
moves.notes: Armor Break | 2 hits of armor on upper body while holding the punch buttons

moves.name: LP Dimachaerus
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 5-15 | Cancelable into follow-up only on hit

moves.name: MP Dimachaerus
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 6-19 on head and upper body | Cancelable into follow-up only on hit

moves.name: HP Dimachaerus
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 10-25 on head and shoulders only | Cancelable into follow-up only on hit

moves.name: OD Dimachaerus
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 5-19 | Armor Break

moves.name: LP Dimachaerus Follow-up
moves.notes: This follow-up is only possible on hit

moves.name: MP Dimachaerus Follow-up
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited OTG juggle state on hit | This follow-up is only possible on hit

moves.name: HP Dimachaerus Follow-up
moves.notes: Puts the opponent into a limited OTG juggle state on hit | This follow-up is only possible on hit

moves.name: OD Dimachaerus Follow-up
moves.notes: Puts the opponent into a limited OTG juggle state on hit | This follow-up is only possible on hit

moves.name: LP Phalanx
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 7-11 | Airborne on frames 11-30 (Forced Knockdown)

moves.name: MP Phalanx
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 7-13 | Airborne on frames 14-33 (Forced Knockdown)

moves.name: HP Phalanx
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 10-15 | Airborne on frames 17-37 (Forced Knockdown)

moves.name: OD Phalanx
moves.notes: Armor Break | 1 hit of armor against High and Mid attacks (loses to Low attacks) on frames 6-12

moves.name: LK Quadriga
moves.notes: About 50% screen length in range

moves.name: MK Quadriga
moves.notes: About 60% screen length in range

moves.name: HK Quadriga
moves.notes: About 70% screen length in range

moves.name: OD Quadriga
moves.notes: Armor Break | Wall Splats the opponent on hit

moves.name: Scutum
moves.notes: 1 hit of armor on frame 3 and onwards on her upper body (no armor on the lower body) while in stance (as long as the Kick button is held down) up to frame 118 (followed by 26 unarmormored recovery frames) | Cancelable into follow-up attacks from frame 8

moves.name: Scutum (absorb)
moves.notes: This counter-attack automatically triggers whenever Marisa's armor during the stance absorbs any hit | No armor during the start-up of this counterattack

moves.name: OD Scutum
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frame 1 and onward on her whole body (not just upper body like the non-OD version) while in stance (as long as a Kick buttons is held down) up to frame 58 (followed by 29 unarmored recovery frames) | Cancelable into follow-up attacks from frame 8

moves.name: OD Scutum (absorb)
moves.notes: This counter-attack automatically triggers whenever Marisa's armor during the stance absorbs any hit | 1 hit of armor on frames 1-10 (start-up and active frames)

moves.name: Tonitrus 1
moves.notes: Overhead | First active frame can only hit airborne opponents (effectively 16F start-up against grounded opponents)

moves.name: Tonitrus 2
moves.notes: Knocks opponent down | True blockstring

moves.name: Procella
moves.notes: Low | Hard Knockdown

moves.name: Enfold
moves.notes: Range: 1.11~1.17 | Minimum start-up overall is 13F if you factor in the 8F start-up of the stance before the 5F command grab is initiated

moves.name: Javelin of Marisa
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frame 1 (during screen freeze) | 2 hits of armor on frames 1-23

moves.name: Javelin of Marisa (Hold)
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frame 1 (during screen freeze) | 2 hits of armor on frames 1-47

moves.name: Javelin of Marisa (Counter)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-10 | Armor Break

moves.name: Meteorite
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-16 | Airborne on frames 17-47 (Forced Knockdown)

moves.name: Goddess of the Hunt
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-19 | Armor Break

moves.name: Goddess of the Hunt (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-19 | Armor Break
